title: Well-formed phased migration — correct NOVALIDATE + ONLINE + batching pattern
expected_feedback: No violations. Correctly implements phased migration: (1) add nullable column with DDL_LOCK_TIMEOUT, (2) PK-range batched backfill, (3) app dual-write, (4) ENABLE NOVALIDATE then VALIDATE (non-blocking), (5) SET UNUSED for cleanup. DDL_LOCK_TIMEOUT set for all DDL sessions.
